title: Ahmedabad, Gujarat — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ahmedabad, Gujarat: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ahmedabad is a city in Gujarat with a population of 7,650,000. A major industrial and commercial hub in Gujarat, known for its Sabarmati Riverfront, textile industry, and Mahatma Gandhi’s ashram.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
